21.gl: to be safe (in mind, body or estate); figuratively, to be (causatively, make) completed; by implication, to be friendly; by extension, to reciprocate (in various applications)
21.kj: make amends, (make an) end, finish, full, give again, make good, (re-) pay (again), (make) (to) (be at) peace(-able), that is perfect, perform, (make) prosper(-ous), recompense, re

21.gl: the bottom (as depressed); only adverbially, below (often with prepositional prefix underneath), in lieu of, etc.
21.kj: as, beneath, [idiom] flat, in(-stead), (same) place (where...is), room, for...sake, stead of, under, [idiom] unto, [idiom] when...was mine, whereas, (where-) fore, with.

21.gl: to run after (usually with hostile intent; figuratively (of time) gone by)
21.kj: chase, put to flight, follow (after, on), hunt, (be under) persecute(-ion, -or), pursue(-r).

22.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
22.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

22.gl: to widen (in any direction), i.e. (intransitively) recede or (transitively) remove (literally or figuratively, of place or relation)
22.kj: (a-, be, cast, drive, get, go, keep (self), put, remove, be too, (wander), withdraw) far (away, off), loose, [idiom] refrain, very, (be) a good way (off).

22.gl: not (the qualified negation, used as a deprecative); once (Job 24:25) as a noun, nothing
22.kj: nay, neither, [phrase] never, no, nor, not, nothing (worth), rather than.

22.gl: to loosen, i.e. relinquish, permit, etc.
22.kj: commit self, fail, forsake, fortify, help, leave (destitute, off), refuse, [idiom] surely.

22.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
22.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).
